summary: Strong, well-structured test suite that covers all top-level requirements — model deserialization, cache miss/hit, exponential backoff math, pagination termination, and retry integration. The four TDD cycles are clearly labelled and each component is isolated behind clean test doubles (InMemoryFileSystem, injectable no-op sleep, Moq IHttpService). Notable gaps in coverage/rigor: (1) no multi-page traversal test — GetAllPostsWithCommentsAsync is only exercised with a single page, so a pagination bug crossing from page N to N+1 would go undetected; (2) no test for invalid/malformed JSON responses from the HTTP layer; (3) HttpService itself has no unit tests (non-2xx status codes, network errors); (4) no test for CancellationToken propagation through the full ApiClient→RetryPolicy→IHttpService call chain; (5) two CacheService tests are declared 'async Task' but contain no 'await', which is a minor smell but does not affect correctness. Design is excellent: constructor-level fixture setup, shared JSON constants, descriptive naming, and the InMemoryFileSystem helper is clean and reusable across test classes.
